instruction: Write a FreeMarker macro `renderMenu` that renders a two-level navigation menu from `menuItems` with optional nested `children` sequences. Top-level items without children render as plain links. Escape labels and URLs.
code:
<#-- Model: menuItems: [{ label, url, children? }] --> <#macro renderMenu items>
    <#list items![] as item>
  • ${item.label?html} <#if item.children?has_content>
      <#list item.children as child>
    • ${child.label?html}
